title: Select heavy vehicle tyres, wheels and rims
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Select heavy vehicle tyres, wheels and rims demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify tyre and wheel options

pcs.text: Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Obtain and interpret tyre and wheel information in order to identify tyre and wheel options required for the job1.3 Identify hazards and issues associated with the work, assess potential risks and implement control measures from workplace health and safety requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Obtain and interpret tyre and wheel information in order to identify tyre and wheel options required for the job1.3 Identify hazards and issues associated with the work, assess potential risks and implement control measures from workplace health and safety requirements?

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Identify tyre and wheel options

elements.title: Select tyres and wheels for specific applications

pcs.text: Assess technical compliance and economic benefits of tyre, wheel and rim options2.2 Select tyres, wheels, and rims according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, Australian Design Rules, and customer requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess technical compliance and economic benefits of tyre, wheel and rim options2.2 Select tyres, wheels, and rims according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, Australian Design Rules, and customer requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess technical compliance and economic benefits of tyre, wheel and rim options2.2 Select tyres, wheels, and rims according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, Australian Design Rules, and customer requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Select tyres and wheels for specific applications

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Communicate selection to appropriate personnel or customer according to workplace procedures3.2 Complete and process workplace documentation according to workplace procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate selection to appropriate personnel or customer according to workplace procedures3.2 Complete and process workplace documentation according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Complete work processes
